title: Plug Power Flips The Switch On Profitability
text: Plug Power has flipped the switch on profitability through significant operational improvements and strategic execution. The company achieved a 22% year-over-year revenue expansion and significantly narrower losses, marking an important business inflection point. Gross margins improved dramatically by 42 percentage points, moving from negative 55% to negative 13% year-over-year. Project Quantum Leap strategy has delivered substantial results with per-unit service costs reduced over 30%. Management projects achieving positive run rate for earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization by the fourth quarter of 2026. Rather than diluting shareholders, the company is generating cash through asset sales projected at $275 million and inventory reduction with $100 million target. Grid constraints are driving enterprise clients like Amazon and Walmart to adopt Plug Power's behind-the-meter hydrogen solutions for energy independence, creating a substantial new addressable market opportunity.
